title: AI-powered Virtual Event Host
scenario: Create a prompt that will generate a high-quality, engaging, and coherent persona-based chatbot dialogue for a virtual event host. The target output should be a text-based dialogue that incorporates humor, expertise, and audience interaction. The event is a tech conference and the host should be knowledgeable about the latest advancements in AI and robotics. The dialogue should be 5-7 lines long, use a warm and approachable tone, and include a call-to-action for attendees to ask questions. The host should also be able to respond to audience questions in a way that is both informative and entertaining.
constraints: Must include a minimum of 2 audience questions and responses

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the dialogue adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the tone of the dialogue warm, approachable, and engaging?
Is the dialogue high-quality, informative, and entertaining?
Does the dialogue include a clear and compelling call-to-action for attendees?
